tools.name: 0trace
tools.description: Traceroute via existing TCP connections. Identifies hop path using established sessions.

tools.name: aircrack-ng
tools.description: 802.11 WEP/WPA cracking suite. Monitor mode, packet injection, handshake capture.

tools.name: armitage
tools.description: Metasploit GUI. Team server for collaborative red team operations.

tools.name: beef-xss
tools.description: Browser Exploitation Framework. Hooks browsers via XSS for command/control.

tools.name: binwalk
tools.description: Firmware analysis. Extracts embedded files and filesystems from binary blobs.

tools.name: bloodhound
tools.description: Active Directory attack path mapper. Ingests LDAP/ACE data into a graph model.

tools.name: bloodhound.py
tools.description: Python BloodHound ingestor. Collects AD data for SharpHound-compatible graphs.

tools.name: crackmapexec
tools.description: Swiss army knife for AD pentesting. SMB, WinRM, LDAP, MSSQL lateral movement.

tools.name: dsniff
tools.description: Password sniffing suite. arpspoof, dnsspoof, mailsnarf, and file extraction.

tools.name: ettercap
tools.description: MITM suite. ARP poisoning, sniffing, filtering, and protocol dissection.

tools.name: hashcat
tools.description: GPU-accelerated password recovery. Supports hundreds of hash types and attack modes.

tools.name: hydra
tools.description: Parallelized network login cracker. Supports dozens of protocols and brute-force modes.

tools.name: impacket
tools.description: Python classes for network protocols. SMB, Kerberos, LDAP tooling for AD attacks.

tools.name: impacket-scripts
tools.description: Impacket example scripts. psexec, secretsdump, getTGT, and dozens more.

tools.name: jadx
tools.description: DEX to Java decompiler. Android APK analysis with GUI and CLI.

tools.name: john
tools.description: Password hash cracker (John the Ripper). Wordlist and rule-based attacks.

tools.name: ligolo-ng
tools.description: Tunneling without SOCKS. Reverse TCP/TLS pivot through compromised hosts.

tools.name: metasploit-framework
tools.description: Exploitation framework. Modules for exploits, payloads, auxiliaries, encoders, post-exploitation, and evasion.

tools.name: netexec
tools.description: Successor to CrackMapExec. Network protocol abuse for Windows/AD environments.

tools.name: nikto
tools.description: Web server scanner. Tests for outdated software, dangerous files, and misconfigs.

tools.name: nmap
tools.description: Network mapper. Host discovery, port scanning, service/version detection, OS fingerprinting, NSE scripting.

tools.name: powershell
tools.description: PowerShell on Linux (pwsh). Cross-platform scripting for automation and attacks.

tools.name: pspy
tools.description: Process monitor without root. Observes process execution via /proc scraping.

tools.name: recon-ng
tools.description: Modular reconnaissance framework. Marketplace of OSINT modules.

tools.name: responder
tools.description: LLMNR/NBT-NS/mDNS poisoner. Captures NetNTLM hashes on local networks.

tools.name: scapy
tools.description: Packet manipulation library. Craft, send, sniff, and dissect arbitrary protocols.

tools.name: snort
tools.description: Network IDS/IPS. Signature-based detection with rule language and preprocessors.

tools.name: sqlmap
tools.description: Automatic SQL injection detection and exploitation. DB fingerprinting, data exfiltration, OS shell.

tools.name: steghide
tools.description: Steganography tool. Embeds/extracts data in JPEG, BMP, WAV, and AU files.

tools.name: theharvester
tools.description: OSINT gathering. Emails, subdomains, hosts from public search engines and APIs.

tools.name: wireshark
tools.description: Packet capture and protocol dissection. Live capture and PCAP analysis with display filters.

tools.name: yara
tools.description: Pattern matching for malware identification. Rules match strings, hex, and conditions.
